candidate_definition_hints.text: A tiny specification for hyperlinking & deeplinking any 3D filetype, fostering linkable AR/VR websites. Address and Control anything inside a 3D model. Simply SURF a 3D file-verse and design for a Spatial Open Internet with the highest degree of interoperabili
